sources.notes: 19K followers, 3 following. Tagline "We Care. We Can." Founded 2010 (per logo). Category Hospital, Price Range $$, Always open. About tab has no public email or phone. Phone (02) 8248-7400 and Emergency 24/7 loc. 1017 found on official promo graphics/reels (Pulmonary Function Test ad, All Saints' Day emergency banner) — not on the About tab. Photos tab has no real interior/exterior gallery beyond the cover — mostly text-heavy marketing graphics (hiring ads, service promos, health-awareness campaigns) plus one real photo of a lobby rollup banner. HD assets downloaded via Chrome DevTools MCP inspect + curl with matching signed fbcdn query params and browser User-Agent/Referer headers (get_network_request file save blocked by sandbox path restrictions, response body evicted from cache — replicated request via curl instead): cover/hero 1640x720 PNG→JPG (building exterior with signage) and profile logo 480x480 JPG (globe + caduceus emblem). Real services observed in posts: Pulmonology diagnostics (pulmonary function test / spirometry, ABG/VBG, ventilation, chest physiotherapy, nebulization), immunization/vaccination, cardiology/heart-health awareness, blood donation partnership, 24/7 emergency.

contact.name: Pacific Global Medical Center
contact.address: Lot 2B Mindanao Avenue, Novaliches, Quezon City, Philippines 1116

quotation.packageScope: One-page responsive hospital site, services & departments, community programs, FAQ, contact/emergency section, basic SEO, Netlify hosting setup
quotation.paymentTerms: 50% upfront to begin · 50% on delivery (not the full amount upfront)

outreach.notes: Initial quotation sent 2026-07-17 via Laravel API to pgmccareers@gmail.com; auto follow-ups 1w enabled (max 4).
